description: Elite-hunter marksman with weaker status power.

damage_rules.debug_label: GUNSLINGER PASSIVE: +35% damage vs priority target

presentation.headline: Baseline precision shooter with clean ranged tempo.
presentation.fantasy_hook: Fast, readable firearms make the Gunslinger the clean reference pick for players who want crisp ranged control.
presentation.identity_summary: The Gunslinger is the readable reference character: fast bullets, crisp target focus, and a straightforward ranged build path. He rewards steady combat flow and priority target control without leaning on exotic mechanics.
presentation.passive_summary: Killing an enemy briefly boosts attack speed, helping the Gunslinger chain clean gun pressure through a wave.
tradeoffs: Less exotic utility than the stranger archetypes
Relies on clean aim and tempo more than raw gimmicks
